description: NASA Open Science Data Repository ID

example: Rodent Research-1(RR-1), Muscle Atrophy of Muscle Sparing in Transgenic Mice (CASIS RR1)
The Rodent Research-1 National Lab (RR-1 CASIS) experiment was performed to study ...

description: Scientific name of the biological organism from which the sample was derived, representing the biological species used in the spaceflight or analog experiment
NCBI taxonomic classification (e.g., lineage or higher-level) describing the organism's placement within a biological taxonomy to contextualize its evolutionary relationships
Specific genetic background, cultivar, or strain identifier of the host organism, distinguishing sub-populations or lines used in the study to control for genetic variation
DOI for the dataset from investigation.study.comment.doi
External accession (e.g., GEO) from investigation.study.comment.data source accession
Versioned OSDR repository URL including the dataset version number (e.g., OSD-244 at version 15)
Total number of samples in the study
Total number of assays in the study
All organisms in the study (unique per study)
